config.script:
class CNavoArraySupport
public mvarAnotherArray
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zamień dwa elementy ze sobą '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function swapelements(byref pnavoarray, byref nindexelem1, byref nindexelem2) dim varElem
set varElem = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = varElem end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest < elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function less(byval elem1, byval elem2) Less = (elem1.m_strKey < elem2.m_strKey) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest > elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function more(byval elem1, byval elem2) More = (elem1.m_strKey > elem2.m_strKey) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest = elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function equal(byval elem1, byval elem2) Equal = (elem1.m_strKey = elem2.m_strKey) end function
end class
class CListElement public m_strKey public m_idobjPos public m_nOrgLp
private sub class_initialize() m_strKey = "" end sub
end class
dim g_elements
function init_sorter_by_objfld(byref lista , byval strObjFld , byval strKey) set g_elements = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() set g_elements.Operations = new CNavoArraySupport dim elem,pListElem,iter for each elem in lista set pListElem = new CListElement pListElem.m_idobjPos = elem.idobj if strObjFld = "" then pListElem.m_strKey = elem.field(strKey) else if not elem.field(strObjFld) is nothing then pListElem.m_strKey = elem.field(strObjFld).field(strKey) end if end if g_elements.add pListElem next end function
function sort_list_internal (byref lista , byval bASC) g_elements.sort dim iter,elem for iter = g_elements.upperindex to 0 step -1 set elem = g_elements.value(iter) if bASC then 'wstawiamy od "najwiekszego" elementu na początek lista.move lista.findonid(elem.m_idobjPos) , 1 else 'wstawiamy zawsze na koniec czyli po przeleceniu calej navoarray lista bedzie 'posortowana rosnąco lista.move lista.findonid(elem.m_idobjPos) , lista.count() end if next end function
function sort_list_by_objfld (byref lista , byval strObjectFld , byval strKeyFld , byval bASC) init_sorter_by_objfld lista , strObjectFld , strKeyFld sort_list_internal lista , bASC end function
